title: Protocol for the Systematic Review of the cognitive declines/IQ loss due to prenatal Phthalate Exposure (An update of the protocol by Radke et al, 2020)
author: Chatterjee, Mousumi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our protocol is an update of the study by Radke et al. (2020) published in Environment International on a systematic review of phthalate exposure and neurodevelopment effects on children. Our protocol focuses on IQ loss in terms of scores as a health endpoint in children.
steps_raw: Our protocol is an update of the study by Radke et al. (2020) published in Environment International on a systematic review of phthalate exposure and neurodevelopment effects on children. Our protocol focuses on IQ loss in terms of scores as a health endpoint in children.
